body: About Agrometal Our History Trading, Logistics & warehousing Products Ferrous Metals Non-Ferrous Metals Agricultural Commodities Services Commodity Hedging Currency Hedging Logistics Sustainability Contact Us Home About About Agrometal Our History Trading, Logistics & warehousing Products Ferrous Metals Non-Ferrous Metals Agricultural Commodities Services Commodity Hedging Currency Hedging Logistics Sustainability Contact Us Home About About Agrometal Our History Trading, Logistics & warehousing Products Ferrous Metals Non-Ferrous Metals Agricultural Commodities Services Commodity Hedging Currency Hedging Logistics Sustainability Contact Us Trading, Logistics & warehousing Business Model & Value Proposition Agro Metal creates value by seamlessly connecting global supply and demand trading, moving, and managing risk on metals and agri-commodities while leveraging deep partnerships and upstream integration for lasting competitive advantage.
Agro Metal is a global leader trading steel, metals, grains, oilseeds efficiently.
Agro Metal combines steel sourcing across Africa, Middle East, Asia ensuring supply.
Agro Metal oversees sourcing, blending, inventory, risk, shipping, financing with quality controls.
Agro Metal secures African mining rights, boosting profits while integrated trading logistics remain core.
